creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
Hi all,

the changes in this version are very small and are up to inaccuracies
in the comments; but it needs to change, at the same time, many
different references to this version in the ports system, so this
long list.

Bye Jacula Modyun

Fix: diff -uNr hs-hscolour-docs.orig/Makefile hs-hscolour-docs/Makefile
--- hs-hscolour-docs.orig/Makefile	2008-08-15 03:30:20.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-hscolour-docs/Makefile	2008-10-24 06:50:36.000000000 +0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	hscolour-docs
-PORTVERSION=	1.10
+PORTVERSION=	1.10.1
 CATEGORIES=	print haskell
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.cs.york.ac.uk/pub/haskell/contrib/ \
 		http://hackage.haskell.org/packages/archive/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
diff -uNr hs-hscolour-docs.orig/distinfo hs-hscolour-docs/distinfo
--- hs-hscolour-docs.orig/distinfo	2008-08-15 03:30:20.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-hscolour-docs/distinfo	2008-10-24 06:51:07.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (hscolour-1.10.tar.gz) = 553b71a6b269b023de7050461918a8e0
-SHA256 (hscolour-1.10.tar.gz) = ebeeb6829d8789b16a66753144dfcf4ba35f12d40ff978be4b5669d8cbb09073
-SIZE (hscolour-1.10.tar.gz) = 51246
+MD5 (hscolour-1.10.1.tar.gz) = 6f1c3ff145d18f86ea66805fd8bb625e
+SHA256 (hscolour-1.10.1.tar.gz) = 293f24b8373be1d70d9e5a4b8d3c527166ad645b4ac983c1a6fc5999c44a2d36
+SIZE (hscolour-1.10.1.tar.gz) = 51292
--- patch-hs-hscolour-docs ends here ---

diff -uNr hs-HGL-ghc.orig/Makefile hs-HGL-ghc/Makefile
--- hs-HGL-ghc.orig/Makefile	2008-08-15 04:51:57.000000000 +0000
+++ hs-HGL-ghc/Makefile	2008-10-24 08:36:20.000000000 +0000
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	HGL
 PORTVERSION=	3.2.0.0
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	graphics haskell
 MASTER_SITES=	http://hackage.haskell.org/packages/archive/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	hs-
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	haddock:${PORTSDIR}/devel/hs-haddock \
 		HsColour:${PORTSDIR}/print/hs-hscolour
 
-HSCOLOUR_VERSION=	1.10
+HSCOLOUR_VERSION=	1.10.1
 HSCOLOUR_DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/hscolour-${HSCOLOUR_VERSION}
 
 PORTDOCS=	*
--- patch-hs-HGL-ghc ends here ---
